changelog.notes: Swapped to J2534 build for Autel IM608 / MaxiFlash on Windows — drops WebSerial/ELM327 path, talks directly to the J2534 DLL.
Direct J2534 BCM VIN programmer — 17 FCA security algorithms, BCM auto-discovery, one-shot bcm-write.
Added passive CAN monitor (monitor --duration) and verbose scan -v with full TX/RX log.
Probe-by-address (--tx/--rx), named-module read, Autel MaxiPro + DrewTech driver support.
